0.2.0 — Freeze trace: freeze-trace.log in app userData; Dev Log → Open freeze trace log; main event-loop lag + renderer checkpoints; webContents unresponsive / render-process-gone. Set GOONOPTICON_FREEZE_TRACE=0 to disable.
0.2.0 — Splash, home screen, and Command Center pick a random image from splash/images (png, jpg, webp, gif, avif, bmp).
0.2.0 — Chat: Live streams On/Off on the Chat screen only; hint copy updated; background chat reconnect when live mode is on.
Tweet alerts: optional blue pulse + corner popup (Twitter embed + oEmbed text) with a separate three-note chime when @podawful posts (same poll interval as feed alarm).
Pod Awful feed alarm: optional CRT pop-out, alarm tone, and main-window shake on new video or live (Configure → General). RSS + optional YouTube API key for live.
Custom window chrome (frameless, theme-matched title bar).
Settings reorganized into tabs: General, Display, Appearance, Sound, Extension, Virus popup, Chat.
Default font size increased; font size and font family in Appearance.
Command Center: changelog from file, configurable YouTube channel, Awful.tube, X, Instagram.
Join the Cult (Discord) link in footer.
App/taskbar icon uses same as tray when available.
Virus popup: optional random video popup from a folder.
Dev Log: filter by category, more action logging.
Music: subfolder tabs (Root + one tab per subfolder).
Tracker: latest YouTube video with thumbnail; social links (X, Facebook).
Timecode Arsenal: embed hint when video does not play (e.g. Error 153).
Version and bridge status in footer; offline = extension not connected.
